title: neoalsomitra schefferiana
intro: Neoalsomitra schefferiana, also known as the Scheffer's cycnium or the Philippine cycas, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cynometra and is native to the Philippines. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neoalsomitra schefferiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including a decoction made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a tincture extracted with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
